# Setup log

Append-only record of when playbook entries were applied, on which machine, and any deviations from [setup.md](setup.md).

**Do not edit existing entries.** Add new rows at the bottom of each table. Use your machine's hostname or a short descriptive name (e.g. `mbp-work`, `mac-mini-home`).

---

## ccstatusline

| Date | Machine | Action | Outcome | Notes |
